nasb.text: Ascribe to the Lord the glory due His name; Bring an offering, and come before Him; Worship the Lord in holy array.

esv.text: Ascribe to the Lord the glory due his name; bring an offering and come before him! Worship the Lord in the splendor of holiness;

cnv.text: 要把耶和華的名應得的榮耀歸給他， 拿著禮物到他面前來， 要以聖潔的裝飾敬拜耶和華。

ccb.text: 要将耶和华当得的荣耀归给祂， 要将供物献给祂， 要穿上圣洁的衣服敬拜祂。
